title: GraphModel.toJSON()
tension_note: DRM: spec:serialization-format documents edge preservation, but this artifact historically dropped type field

title: GraphModel.getNeighbors()
tension_note: TCD: spec:type-declarations declares NodeData[] return, actual runtime returns Set<string>

title: Links (legacy term)
tension_note: VOC: same concept as concept:edges but no same_as edge exists

title: Edges (canonical term)
tension_note: VOC: same concept as concept:links but no same_as edge exists

title: Projection Formula V = P(G,F,S,Params)
tension_note: USC: no proved_by edge to any evidence or invariant node

title: Epistemic Log
tension_note: MBR: intentionally isolated from main cluster — no edges to any other node

title: Projection Idempotency
tension_note: USC-RB: constrained by navigation but has no proved_by edge to evidence

title: Knowledge Substrate
tension_note: MBR-RB: isolated concept — no edges to any other node

title: computeVisibleSubgraph()
tension_note: DRM-RB: drifts from spec:api-contract — scope computation diverged from documented API
